author: Rustas)
title: О
body: Крута програмка, відтворює музику з "Файлів". Раджу, так як до цього часу аналогів плеєра не знайшов

author: Tecnotinto
title: La más completa que he visto
body: Excelente aplicación, justo lo que andaba buscando y necesitaba después de haber probados como 50 apps. Está si cumplió con todo lo que quería. 5 estrellas!!

author: volosong
title: The perfect audio player without having to use Music or iTunes.
body:
This program is an answer to prayer.  Was searching high and low for an audio player that would play files from within a folder.  No need for loading music into iTunes or Music.  Just move the audio files to an iPad folder, (I use a thumb drive), load the files into a playlist within FirePlayer, and play away.

The only improvement I would like to see is a dedicated “button” on the player page whereby shuttle play can be invoked or stopped.  There is an icon.  Perhaps I do not know how to use it yet.  In any case, this is a minor inconvenience.  I love this program!

author: Gvvyb
title: Програма регулярно вилітає.
body: Може закритись під час програвання плей листа або при спробі програвання скачаної музики. Версія Про.

author: DrPhil88
title: Stops playing
body: The app seems to have excellent sound and many features. Unfortunately it's not user friendly. I've had major brain trauma so I can't comprehend things the way I used to.  Can't figure out why the app closes after playing one or two songs. Can't sync my itunes. I paid for pro version thinking that would fix things but it hasn't. Frustrating!

title: Please update the app
body: My MediaFire files aren’t uploading my songs properly

author: fahrinna
title: App inservible.
body: Como se supone q” voy a entrar si no se puede crear cuenta ni me permite acceder a mis iClouds de ningún modo...

author: Disintegration87
title: Download glitch
body: I use a few of your different apps for listening to files from MEGA and Google Drive which all work perfectly. However, this app doesn’t seem to be able to download files; when downloading, the download speed will much lower than usual, and when it comes to completion, the download just starts again, so I can’t download any files. A fix for this would be great.

author: Proteus4000
title: This app is awesome.
body:
This app is awesome. 

Keep up the great work guys.

author: Mhamid
title: So far very good
body: I just download it....few hours ago...so far it is asi expected ... detailed review latter

author: Shaileewood
title: Good but could be better
body: Nice for listening to some music on files. But Mediafire needs to upgrade its app so every file format gets supported or at least convert them automatically to be playable on its app. Not the case right now.

author: J.Kalloe
title: Een super app
body: Het werkt heel goed en gebruiksvriendelijk.

author: Hibernés
title: Fireplayer Pro
body: Por ahora bien. Espero que continúe así en próximas actualizaciones. Merece la pena pasarse a la versión Pro.

author: cashleap
title: Almost awesome
body: Really like this and what it’s trying to do. One massive really annoying flaw is a glitch that keeps files from downloading. The file will download in the downloads section and then constantly reset until MAYBE it downloads. It’s really frustrating and should be fixed ASAP. Otherwise good app.

author: Tuckertheman347
title: Es el mejor
body: Gracias fireplayer, tengo un iphone viejito y esta app me salvó la vida, puedo escuchar mi musica preferida y administrarla comodamente. Además tiene otros extras y puedo usar mi cuenta de mediafire para guardar en la nube. Excelente.

author: International English Speaker
title: Amazing
body: Love it

author: Mike Fay
title: Awesome app
body: Links to mediafire cloud accounts and streams your music files. Best way to maximize free cloud storage. More GB than free versions of icloud and dropbox combined - love it

author: Leon Degrelles
title: Great
body:
Surprisingly good, I often take time to upload uncompressed sound projects and videos I have made in mediafire so I can get some feedback, it is just so satisfying to just have a way to get offline downloads on mediafire to get the occasion to listen to some tunes not available on Apple Music.
They also have a nice EQ interface, (an 8 band-EQ, not optimal, but still really well done)
 Good job!

author: Eeeeeeeeedson
title: Não faz download direito...
body: Assim como o Evermusic, que por acaso é de plataforma idêntica, os downloads para ouvir off-line não funcionam direito. Algumas abaixam e a maioria não.
